rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, 'this is silly' flipped to 'because I want to and it makes me happy,' then he did it anyway. That's a win AND a skill. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, change room, poncho still on — round goes to Matt. But the Apollo ring and necklace stayed home because of pool nerves and 'reads as obviously gay' — yeah, that's the point, and they got that one.
pattern: They're loud at work and with his people, near-silent with strangers — he'll wear the jockstrap for nobody, but he won't wear the necklace for colleagues.
